reviews.text:
We’ve loved Coffee on the Rocks as a coffee shop for years, so we were thrilled to host our wedding celebration there — and it completely exceeded expectations. The space is beautifully designed — simple yet magical — and the setting, especially in the fall, is absolutely stunning.

The entire team was so helpful throughout the planning and booking process, and a special shoutout to Lydia, who went above and beyond on the day of to make sure everything went smoothly. She was so kind and attentive, and we couldn’t have asked for better support. The bartenders were also fantastic and kept the evening fun and relaxed. We’re so grateful for such a wonderful experience and can’t recommend this venue highly enough!

We had a beautiful wedding reception at Coffee on the Rocks. Celebrating with our family and  friends in this amazing setting was a gift will remember forever 💗

The girls , Lydia, Mackenzie, Rachael were so helpful with the planning and really made this a special day.

We had the reception on a beautiful summer morning. Thank you for allowing us to give our son and daughter-in-law a day they will always treasure.

We said "I do" at Wedding on the Rocks and it was everything I ever dreamed it would be! I absolutely adored Lydia, our day-of coordinator. She was wonderful with communication, taking the time to hop on the phone with me several times to help me organize everything (we live in Ohio and planned from afar). On the wedding day itself, she was so kind, calm, and sweet, making the whole experience feel stress-free. Thanks to her, our day went seamlessly and I truly didn’t have to worry about a thing. I’m so grateful we had her on our team! The venue was stunning and it couldn't have gone better.

Venue on the rocks is and will be the biggest upcoming venue for elopements/weddings. My husband and I toured many venues looking for the perfect place to have our reception, we were on our last ditch effort when we stumbled upon Venue on the rocks and FELL IN LOVE with the venue. Us and our guests had such a positive experience with Rachel, Lydia, Kinsey and the whole staff. Planning was fairly easy AND affordable for our budget, and everyone was so so kind.

It was everything we could have imagined and more. We had an absolute blast and our guests have never seen anything like it before.

Like all new wedding venues, there is always room to improve when starting out. Rachel was very understanding when small details of our day were discussed and helped us come up with solutions to better fit the venue as a business, while keeping our wants in mind.

We appreciate the lengths you all go to keep your bride and grooms happy and all of the extra effort that goes into a wedding business.

We would 110% recommended Venue on the Rocks for your wedding or stopping into the coffee shop for the best cup of coffee in Estes!

Thank you so much for making our day unforgettable, can’t wait to visit!

Venue on the Rocks was the perfect location for the Welcome Party for my son's destination wedding.  Rachel and her staff were so professional and accommodating.  We are from Georgia and had never been to this area before.  Rachel made us feel so comfortable and confident that the night would go off without a hitch.  And it did!!  I would highly recommend Venue on the Rocks for any type of celebration.
